gt_sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T2.state = 'Illinois'
pred_sql: SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code WHERE z.state = 'Illinois';
question: List the full name of the Student_Club members that grew up in Illinois state.
